methods.boolean isCacheEnabled(): Returns true if the cache is enabled.

methods.void setTouchExplorationPassthroughRegio: When AccessibilityServiceInfo.FLAG_REQUEST_TOUCH_EXPLORATION_MODE is enabled, this function requests that touch interactions starting in the specified region of the screen bypass the touch explorer and go straight to the view hierarchy.

methods.void takeScreenshotOfWindow(int accessib: Takes a screenshot of the specified window and returns it via an AccessibilityService.ScreenshotResult.

Use getCallStateForSubscription() to retrieve the call state for a specific telephony subscription (which allows carrier privileged apps), TelephonyCallback.CallStateListener for real-time call state updates, or TelecomManager.isInCall(), which supplies an aggregate "in call" state for the entire device.
